books.title: The Bandit of Ashley Downs: George Muller
books.author: Dave & Neta Jackson
books.rationale: Through the fictionalized character of Curly Roddy, the reader is introduced to George Müller (1805-1898). Müller opened an orphanage in Bristol, England, with 30 children, but through faith and prayer never went into debt and helped over 10,000 orphans during his life.

books.title: Adoniram Judson: Danger on the Streets of Gold
books.author: Irene Howat
books.rationale: The first missionary ever sent from America, Adoniram Judson (1788-1850), faced many challenges as he ministered in the country of Burma. Although he faced many personal trials and even imprisonment by the government, he rejoiced that his translation work and ministry to individuals reached people with the gospel of Jesus Christ.
